title: Lantern Totems
description: Replace the texture of the totem with the lantern texture.
body:
This texture pack replace the know totem texture with the texture of a lantern.

_For the full experience of this pack, use it with [Glowing Totems](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-totem) pack and [Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) mod._

**Thanks for the download.**

### FAQ:

- Q: Does this work with my resource pack?
- A: Yes.

- Q: Do i need some mod for use this?
- A: You dont, but if you want the full experience you can try using a Dynamic Lights mod and the Glowing Totem resource pack.
   
- Q: Does it work with any version?
- A: It works with any version that has (obviously) the lantern. Maybe in older versions can show that red warning sign, but dont worry about that.
